Video.summary: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner.
Video.title: High Anxiety

Video.summary: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.
Video.title: Home-Wrecking Hounds

Video.summary: Cesar helps Melody and Tom, who is so terrified of dogs that he will even leave a job site if one is near, deal with their fears and anxieties.
Video.title: Hounded By Fear

Video.summary: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.
Video.title: Pack Leaders in Training

Video.summary: An Alaskan malamute exhibits aggressive tendencies; Cesar helps a professional dog walker with her clients.
Video.title: Dark Shadow

Video.summary: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and sees how being on the show changed not only the dogs, but the lives of the owners.
Video.title: Lives Changed

Video.summary: A Labrador mix with dog aggression; a Jack Russell terrier and a Queensland heeler whose formerly cordial relationship has become hostile.
Video.title: Fight Club

Video.summary: An aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix; a cocker spaniel with a life-threatening appetite for paper products.
Video.title: The Paper Hoarder

Video.summary: Two wolf hybrids with aggression issues; an aggressive Chihuahua.
Video.title: Born to Be Wild

Video.summary: Cesar tries to help an aggressive Shiba Inu from Japan and meets a wire fox terrier who has a fixation with a riding lawn-mower.
Video.title: Lawnmower Love

Video.summary: A couple's Chihuahua mix terrorizes their mastiff and dominates the house; a pit bull is not growing out of his puppy behavior.
Video.title: Hail Chihuahua

Video.summary: A Wheaten terrier puppy bites when playing; a Jack Russell terrier jumps when the garbage disposal runs and lunges at the dishwasher; a Lab fears shiny floors.
Video.title: K-9 Phobia

Video.summary: Cesar helps a pregnant Ashlee Simpson-Wentz's English bulldog with his aggression issues before the baby arrives; a retriever with food aggression.
Video.title: Pop Star Fallout

Video.summary: A Great Dane behaves aggressively toward strange dogs; a Lhasa apso eats everything she can get her paws on.
Video.title: Secrets and Lies

Video.summary: A vicious Chihuahua frightens the pit bulls at the rescue center where he lives.
Video.title: Chihuahuas From Hell

Video.summary: A basset hound is afraid of her owner's husband; a blue heeler mix with unique bedtime rituals.
Video.title: Night Terrors

Video.summary: A Maltese hates being on his leash; an American Eskimo barks and circles strangers who enter the house; a Nova Scotia duck tolling retriever with a fear of pools.
Video.title: Cesar Goes to Vegas

Video.summary: An aggressive sheepdog/collie mix needs extra attention, so Cesar brings him to the Dog Psychology Center; a St. Bernard with a fear of stairs.
Video.title: Terrible Tobi

Video.summary: An aggressive bulldog; a beagle/terrier mix with a fear of trash cans; a Lab mix who starts to exhibit anxiety outside.
Video.title: Fear the Trash Can

Video.summary: A Chihuahua mix with aggression issues; a Pomeranian with severe separation anxiety; an Aussie/shar pei mix who runs away when his owner coughs.
Video.title: Nail in the Coughin

Video.summary: A Yorkshire terrier barks too much; a once-shy German shepherd becomes aggressive; a shepherd mix has a whining problem.
Video.title: Holy Terror

Video.summary: A pit bull is aggressive toward strangers; a Rottweiler/Shar-Pei mix must get his aggression under control or be euthanized.
Video.title: Rescue Rufus!

Video.summary: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.
Video.title: Blind Rage

Video.summary: A Lab-greyhound mix has aggression problems; a Rhodesian Ridgeback-boxer mix has severe dog aggression.
Video.title: Big Biters
